query:
-- Tue May 19's existing 8 blocks
SELECT b.sortOrder, b.title, b.blockType, b.durationMin, b.startTime, b.description,
       s.name AS subject, ct.code AS topicCode, ct.title AS topicTitle
FROM scheduleBlocks b
LEFT JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = b.planId
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
LEFT JOIN curriculumTopics ct ON ct.id = b.curriculumTopicId
WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY b.sortOrder;

-- Tue May 19's existing 8 blocks
SELECT b.sortOrder, b.title, b.blockType, b.durationMin, b.startTime, b.description,
       s.name AS subject, ct.code AS topicCode, ct.title AS topicTitle
FROM scheduleBlocks b
LEFT JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = b.planId
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
LEFT JOIN curriculumTopics ct ON ct.id = b.curriculumTopicId
WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY b.sortOrder;
